params.param: Заполнение реестра остатков и оборотов для формы 110 (для контекста vtb, для tool adb)

object.name: get_entities
object.property: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'clientchr' AND module_name = 'dwh' THEN table_name END) AS table_dwh_clientchr, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'rf110restturnreg' AND module_name = 'rf110' THEN table_name END) AS table_rf110_rf110restturnreg, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'assetregistercor' AND module_name = 'assetreg' THEN table_name END) AS table_assetreg_assetregistercor, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'account' AND module_name = 'dwh' THEN table_name END) AS table_dwh_account, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'clientjurregister' AND module_name = 'clientjurreg' THEN table_name END) AS table_clientjurreg_clientjurregister, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'secdealrepo' AND module_name = 'dwh' THEN table_name END) AS table_dwh_secdealrepo, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'currency' AND module_name = 'dwh' THEN table_name END) AS table_dwh_currency, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'psregister' AND module_name = 'psreg' THEN table_name END) AS table_psreg_psregister FROM md_entity2table WHERE (entity_name = 'clientchr' AND module_name = 'dwh') OR (entity_name = 'rf110restturnreg' AND module_name = 'rf110') OR (entity_name = 'assetregistercor' AND module_name = 'assetreg') OR (entity_name = 'account' AND module_name = 'dwh') OR (entity_name = 'clientjurregister' AND module_name = 'clientjurreg') OR (entity_name = 'secdealrepo' AND module_name = 'dwh') OR (entity_name = 'currency' AND module_name = 'dwh') OR (entity_name = 'psregister' AND module_name = 'psreg')
